creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to martin.dieringer from comment #4)

Location 'port test' looks:
/wrkdirs/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/graphics/py-poppler-qt4/work/stage//usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/popplerqt4.so

Actual location:
/wrkdirs/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/graphics/py-poppler-qt4/work/stage/tmp/py27-poppler-qt4-0.24.0/lib/python2.7/site-packages/popplerqt4.so




poudriere has no issue with the port :)
